mapper.select: select information_id, information_title, information_content, publish_start_date, publish_end_date, created_date from information_master
select information_title, information_content, publish_start_date, publish_end_date, created_date from information_master where now() between publish_start_date and publish_end_date
select information_id, information_title, information_content, publish_start_date, publish_end_date, created_date from information_master where information_id = #{information_id}
mapper.insert: insert into information_master ( information_title, information_content, publish_start_date, publish_end_date, created_date, update_date ) values (#{information.informationTitle}, #{information.informationContent}, #{information.publishStartDate}, #{information.publishEndDate}, now(), now())
